&[T].comment: Slice reference — the internal pointer is ValidPtr for len(self) elements

core::num::NonZero<T>.comment: NonZero integer — inner value must be non-zero

core::num::nonzero::NonZero<T>.comment: NonZero integer (full path) — inner value must be non-zero

std::num::NonZero<T>.comment: NonZero integer (std path) — inner value must be non-zero
